questions.text: What is the primary purpose of Network cables in Objective 3.0 Hardware?

answers.text: Network cables carry data between network devices and endpoints, commonly using copper twisted pair, coaxial, or fiber media.
In this context, copper network cable carries electrical signals over conductive wire and is commonly used for Ethernet runs inside buildings.
In this context, cat 5 is an older twisted-pair Ethernet cable category that supports legacy Fast Ethernet and limited Gigabit use under favorable conditions.
In this context, cat 5e is enhanced Category 5 cabling commonly used for Gigabit Ethernet over typical Ethernet distances.

Network cables refers to this concept instead: network cables carry data between network devices and endpoints, commonly using copper twisted pair, coaxial, or fiber media.
explanations.c: Cat 5 refers to this concept: cat 5 is an older twisted-pair Ethernet cable category that supports legacy Fast Ethernet and limited Gigabit use under favorable conditions. Network cables refers to this concept instead: network cables carry data between network devices and endpoints, commonly using copper twisted pair, coaxial, or fiber media.
